holdings.infoBox: IYR is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 9.84%, Prologis at 9.46%, Simon Property Group at 4.86%, Equinix at 4.67%, and Digital Realty Trust at 4.36%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Real Estate ETF (IYR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones U.S. Real Estate Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of US real estate equities. IYR was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
